description.en: Attacks an enemy, and has a <color=#28d9ed>50%</color> chance to reduce <color=#28d9ed>Defense</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: 敵単体にダメージを与え、<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>の確率で<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>を<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間DOWNさせる。
description.zh: 攻击敌人,并有<color=#28d9ed>50%</color>的几率造成<color=#28d9ed>防御力</color>降低,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\At the start of the turn, Resurrects (Greater) all dead allies and increases <color=#28d9ed>Priority</color> of the caster by <color=#28d9ed>10%</color>.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\nターン開始時、倒れたすべての味方を復活(強化)させ、自分の<color=#28d9ed>行動ゲージ</color>が<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>UPする。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n턴 시작 시 사망한 모든 아군을 부활(강화)시키고, 본체의 <color=#28d9ed>행동 게이지</color>를 <color=#28d9ed>10%</color> 증가시킵니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n回合开始时,复活(强化)所有已死亡的友军,并使自身的<color=#28d9ed>行动值</color>提升<color=#28d9ed>10%</color>。

description.en: (Passive Effect)\nWhen using <color=#28d9ed>Encircled field</color>, increases all allies' <color=#28d9ed>Speed</color> for <color=#28d9ed>1 turn(s)</color>.
description.jp: (パッシブ効果)\n<color=#28d9ed>炮烙ノ形</color>使用時、味方全体の<color=#28d9ed>スピード</color>が<color=#28d9ed>1ターン</color>の間UPする。
description.kr: (패시브 효과)\n<color=#28d9ed>포락지형</color> 사용 시 <color=#28d9ed>1턴</color> 동안 아군 전체의 <color=#28d9ed>속도</color>가 증가합니다.
description.zh: (被动效果)\n使用<color=#28d9ed>炮烙之刑</color>时,全体友军的<color=#28d9ed>速度</color>提升,持续<color=#28d9ed>1回合</color>。
